differentials.name: indolent course Location:   femur > ribs > spine > pelvis > humerus > scapula > other long bones > clavicle
differentials.raw: indolent course Location:   femur > ribs > spine > pelvis > humerus > scapula > other long bones > clavicle

differentials.name: CYSTIC ANGIOMATOSIS =  extensive involvement of bone
differentials.raw: CYSTIC ANGIOMATOSIS =  extensive involvement of bone

OSSEOUS ANGIOMATOSIS: may occur on both sides of joint DDx:   solitary osseous hemangioma Histo:   endothelium-lined cysts in bone Peak age:   10-15 years (range, 3 months to 55 years) Location:   long bones, skull, flat bones
CYSTIC ANGIOMATOSIS = extensive involve: =  diffuse infiltration of bone / soft tissue by hemangiomatous / lymphangiomatous lesions Age:   first 3 decades of life May be associated with: chylothorax, chyloperitoneum, lymphedema, hepatosplenomegaly, cystic hygroma

context: =  diffuse infiltration of bone / soft tissue by hemangiomatous / lymphangiomatous lesions Age:   first 3 decades of life May be associated with: chylothorax, chyloperitoneum, lymphedema, hepatosplenomegaly, cystic hygroma √  osteolysis with honeycomb / latticework ("hole-within-hole") appearance √  may occur on both sides of joint DDx:   solitary osseous hemangioma Histo:   endothelium-lined cysts in bone Peak age:   10-15 years (range, 3 months to 55 years) Location:   long bones, skull, flat bones √  size of 1-2 mm to several cm √  multiple osteolytic metaphyseal lesions with fine sclerotic
